description_long: This object is a rectangular, faceted jewelry box with a geometric, angular exterior surface that gives it a modern, sculptural appearance. The top surface features a recessed channel filled with what appears to be a cluster of sparkling gemstones or crystals, adding a touch of luxury and visual interest. The box is primarily a muted brown color with subtle variations in tone, and the facets create a play of light and shadow across its surfaces. The gemstones embedded in the top are mostly clear or light-colored, contrasting with the matte, opaque body of the box. The overall design is abstract and geometric, with no visible hinges or clasps, suggesting a seamless construction. This piece would likely serve as a decorative jewelry box or case, intended to store and display precious items.
description: A faceted, geometric jewelry box with a matte brown exterior and a recessed channel of sparkling gemstones on top. The design is modern and abstract, with angular surfaces and a luxurious accent of embedded crystals.
description_view_0: This view highlights the angular, faceted front and top surfaces, with the gemstone-filled channel prominently visible.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the elongated rectangular shape and the continuous geometric pattern, with the gemstones partially visible along the top.
description_view_2: This angle shows the opposite end of the box, again focusing on the faceted surfaces and the sparkling channel running along the top.
description_view_3: The rear side reveals more of the box's geometric facets and a glimpse of the gemstones, with the overall form remaining consistent.
attribute_location_on_body: not worn (intended for tabletop or dresser use)
